name: sabbath-school-tracker
description: A modern Progressive Web App for tracking Sabbath School attendance, activities, and financial contributions for Seventh-day Adventist churches

scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && echo 'No linting configured for backend'
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.clean: npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:backend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run setup:env
scripts.setup:env: cp backend/.env.example backend/.env && cp frontend/.env.example frontend/.env

author: Baliddawa Allan
